careful_builder.name: Careful Builder
careful_builder.description: Takes time to define a clear thesis, author comprehensive invariants, write specific rules, and test thoroughly before shipping.

fast_ship.name: Fast Ship
fast_ship.description: Prioritizes speed over thoroughness. Skips invariant authoring, writes minimal rules, ships without testing. Relies heavily on templates.

template_first.name: Template-First Builder
template_first.description: Starts from a template and customizes. Moderate thoroughness. Some invariants inherited, some authored. Partial testing.

build_discipline.label: Build Discipline
build_discipline.description: How much care is applied to each step of the world-building process

review_process.label: Review Process
review_process.description: Whether the builder reviews invariants, rules, and enforcement before shipping

testing_approach.label: Testing Approach
testing_approach.description: How thoroughly the world is tested before deployment

template_reliance.label: Template Reliance
template_reliance.description: How much the builder depends on pre-built templates vs custom authoring
